LAW AND MOTION 302, TODD ROBINETTE'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE: RECEIVER'S FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: RECEIVER'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER SETTLING AND APPROVING THE FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT AND DISCHARGING THE RECEIVER IN ALL CASES EXCEPT #CGC-09-490868 IS GRANTED. THE RECEIVER IS ALSO PERMITTED TO HOLDBACK $50,600 ($50,000 IN LEGAL FEES AND $600 IN BANK FEES) IN CASE #CGC-09-490868 TO COVER FUTURE EXPENSES. THE REQUEST THAT THE COURT NOT DISCHARGE THE RECEIVER IN ANY OF THE RELATED RECEIVERSHIPS UNTIL SUCH TIME THAT THE COURT IS PREPARED TO DISCHARGE THE RECEIVER IN ALL OF THE RELATED RECEIVERSHIPS IS DENIED. CLAIMANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE THE HEARING IS DENIED. THE RECEIVER'S REQUEST FOR A HOLDBACK OF $5,600 IN EACH CASE OTHER THAN #CGC-09-490868 IS DENIED. THE RECEIVER IS TO RECOVER HIS INCURRED FEES FROM THE RECEIVERSHIP ESTATES. FURTHER, THE COURT INDICATED THAT IN THE REMAINING RECEIVERSHIP (#CGC-09-490868), THE RECEIVER IS TO BE PAID PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S PRIOR ORDER. RECEIVER TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT INDICATES EXACTLY WHAT FUNDS ARE BEING DISPERSED FROM RECEIVERSHIP ESTATE. THE COURT SIGNED AN ORDER RE: THE JUNE 30, 2011 HEARING ON CASE #CGC-09-490868.

LAW AND MOTION 301, TODD ROBINETTE'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON RECEIVER'S FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT AND DECLARATION IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 302 WITH OTHER RELATED HEARINGS ON AUGUST 10, 2011 AT 9:30 A.M. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Notice Of Hearing Receiver'S Final Account And Report And Declaration
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
TODD ROBINETTE'S Notice Of Hearing on Receiver's Final Account And Report And Declaration IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 302 WITH OTHER RELATED HEARINGS ON AUGUST 10, 2011 AT 9:30 A.M. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Other Todd Robinette Notice Of Hearing Receiver'S Final Account And Report
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: TODD ROBINETTE'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE: RECEIVER'S FINAL ACCOUNT AND REPORT.
Appearances: Mark R. Mengelberg and Lawrence Butler of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (397.2823) for Receiver and moving party; Eugene Chang and Julie Fieber of Stein & Lubin LLP (981.0550) for plaintiff Veritas-B Mezz B7, LLC; J. Scott Weaver of West Bay Law Wartelle Weaver & Schreiber (693.0504) for claimants on case #CGC-09-490868 Wartelle Weaver & Schreiber and Greenstein & McDonald

Argued and the court ruled as follows: Receiver's Request for an Order Settling and Approving the Final Account and Report and Discharging the Receiver in all cases except #CGC-09-490868 is granted. The Receiver is also permitted to holdback $50,600 ($50,000 in legal fees and $600 in bank fees) in case #CGC-09-490868 to cover future expenses. The Request that the Court not discharge the Receiver in any of the related receiverships until such time that the Court is prepared to discharge the Receiver in all of the related receiverships is denied. Claimants' Motion to Continue the Hearing is denied. The Receiver's request for a holdback of $5,600 in each case other than #CGC-09-490868 is denied. The Receiver is to recover his incurred fees from the receivership estates. Further, the court indicated that in the remaining receivership (#CGC-09-490868), the receiver is to be paid pursuant to the court's prior order. Receiver to submit a proposed order that indicates exactly what funds are being dispersed from receivership estate. The court signed an order re: the June 30, 2011 hearing on case #CGC-09-490868. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
